response.justification: Candidate has strong polyglot full-stack experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and demonstrated ability with large-scale systems, but lacks the core required expertise for this role: deep Java/Kotlin/JVM background, Spring ecosystem work, and IDE internals experience. The only IDE-adjacent work is C/C++ on LabWindows/CVI over a decade ago. Java appears only as a listed skill with minimal demonstrated depth, and Kotlin/Spring are absent entirely.
strengths: Proven track record on complex, large-scale systems (Sociomantic micro-services at millions RPS)
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, testing tooling authorship)
Some IDE/dev-tooling exposure via LabWindows/CVI C/C++ work and custom test runners
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience
Java listed as a skill but no substantial recent JVM work shown
Career trajectory centered on Node.js/TypeScript/DLang, not JVM enterprise tooling

key_factors.factor: Missing Kotlin and Spring ecosystem experience
Shallow JVM/Java depth relative to requirement
Strong large-scale systems and craftsmanship background
